title: Google Workspace Admin SDK Directory API Models
description: JSON Schema definitions for core resource models in the Google Workspace Admin SDK Directory API, including User, Group, and OrgUnit representations.

UserName.title: User Name
UserName.description: Represents the name of a Google Workspace user, containing given name, family name, and a derived full name.

givenName.description: The user's first name. Required when creating a user account.

familyName.description: The user's last name. Required when creating a user account.

fullName.description: The user's full name formed by concatenating the first and last name values. Read-only.

UserEmail.title: User Email
UserEmail.description: An email address associated with a Google Workspace user account.

type.description: The type of the email account, such as home, work, or other.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

primary.description: Indicates if this is the user's primary email.

UserPhone.title: User Phone
UserPhone.description: A phone number associated with a Google Workspace user account.

type.description: The type of phone number, such as mobile, home, work, or other.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

primary.description: Indicates if this is the user's primary phone number.

UserAddress.title: User Address
UserAddress.description: A physical address associated with a Google Workspace user account.

type.description: The address type, such as home, work, or other.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

locality.description: The town or city of the address.

countryCode.description: The country code using ISO 3166-1 standard.

formatted.description: A full and unstructured postal address.

extendedAddress.description: For extended addresses such as an apartment or suite number.

primary.description: If this is the user's primary address.

sourceIsStructured.description: Indicates if the user-supplied address was formatted.

UserOrganization.title: User Organization
UserOrganization.description: An organization entry associated with a Google Workspace user, representing their employment or affiliation.

title.description: The user's title within the organization.

department.description: Specifies the department within the organization.

costCenter.description: The cost center of the user's organization.

location.description: The physical location of the organization.

domain.description: The domain the organization belongs to.

symbol.description: Text string symbol of the organization.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

primary.description: Indicates if this is the user's primary organization.

fullTimeEquivalent.description: The full-time equivalent millipercent within the organization (100000 = 100%).

UserLocation.title: User Location
UserLocation.description: A physical location associated with a Google Workspace user.

type.description: The location type, such as desk or default.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

area.description: A textual location, useful for display purposes.

floorSection.description: Floor section (a more specific location within the floor).

deskCode.description: Most specific textual code of individual desk location.

User.title: Google Workspace User
User.description: Represents a user account in a Google Workspace domain. Users are the primary entities managed through the Admin SDK Directory API. A user account provides access to Google Workspace services and is associated with an organizational unit.

kind.description: The type of the API resource. Always admin#directory#user.

id.description: The unique ID for the user. A user id can be used as a user request URI userKey.

primaryEmail.description: The user's primary email address. This property is required to create a user account and must be unique across the domain.

name.description: Holds the given and family names of the user, and the read-only fullName value.

isAdmin.description: Indicates a user with super administrator privileges. Can only be changed via the makeAdmin method.

isDelegatedAdmin.description: Indicates if the user is a delegated administrator.

lastLoginTime.description: The last time the user logged in, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

creationTime.description: User's Google Workspace account creation time, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

deletionTime.description: The time the user's account was deleted, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

agreedToTerms.description: Indicates if the user has completed an initial login and accepted the Terms of Service agreement.

password.description: Stores the password for the user account. Required when creating a user. Must be 8-100 ASCII characters. Never returned in API responses.

hashFunction.description: Stores the hash format of the password property.

suspended.description: Indicates if the user is suspended.

suspensionReason.description: The reason a user account is suspended. Only returned if the suspended property is true.

changePasswordAtNextLogin.description: Indicates if the user is forced to change their password at next login.

ipWhitelisted.description: If true, the user's IP address is subject to a deprecated allowlist configuration.

customerId.description: The unique ID for the customer's Google Workspace account.

orgUnitPath.description: The full path of the parent organization associated with the user. If the parent is the top-level organization, it is represented as a forward slash (/).

isMailboxSetup.description: Indicates if the user's Google mailbox has been created.

includeInGlobalAddressList.description: Indicates if the user's profile is visible in the Google Workspace global address list.

thumbnailPhotoUrl.description: Photo URL of the user. Read-only.

archived.description: Indicates if the user is archived.

recoveryPhone.description: Recovery phone of the user. The phone number must be in E.164 format, starting with the plus sign (+).

emails.description: A list of the user's email addresses.

phones.description: A list of the user's phone numbers.

addresses.description: A list of the user's addresses.

organizations.description: A list of organizations the user belongs to.

relations.description: A list of the user's relationships to other users.

value.description: The name or email of the related person.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

externalIds.description: A list of external IDs for the user, such as employee or network ID.

value.description: The value of the external ID.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

websites.description: A list of the user's websites.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

primary.description: Indicates if this is the user's primary website.

preference.description: Controls whether the specified languageCode is the user's preferred language.

type.description: The gender type: male, female, other, or unknown.

customGender.description: A custom gender string when type is other.

addressMeAs.description: How the user should be addressed.

customType.description: A custom type string when type is set to custom.

contentType.description: The content type of the notes body.

customSchemas.description: Custom fields of the user. The key is the schema name. The value is an object with field name/value pairs for the schema.

Group.title: Google Workspace Group
Group.description: Represents a group in a Google Workspace domain. Groups can be used for email distribution, access control, and collaboration. A group has an email address and can contain users, other groups, and service accounts as members.

kind.description: The type of the API resource. Always admin#directory#group.

id.description: The unique ID of the group.

email.description: The group's email address. Required when creating a group. Must be unique.

description.description: An extended description to help users determine the purpose of a group.

adminCreated.description: True if this group was created by an administrator rather than a user.

directMembersCount.description: The number of users that are direct members of the group. Members of child groups are not counted.

aliases.description: A list of the group's alias email addresses.

nonEditableAliases.description: A list of the group's non-editable alias email addresses outside of the account's primary domain.

OrgUnit.title: Google Workspace Organizational Unit
OrgUnit.description: Represents an organizational unit in a Google Workspace domain. Organizational units allow administrators to configure user service access, apply policies, and manage settings hierarchically. The hierarchy is limited to 35 levels of depth.

kind.description: The type of the API resource. Always admin#directory#orgUnit.

name.description: The organizational unit's path name. For example, an organizational unit with parent path /corp and name sales is derived as /corp/sales.

orgUnitPath.description: The full path to the organizational unit. A derived property based on parentOrgUnitPath and the name.

orgUnitId.description: The unique ID of the organizational unit.

parentOrgUnitPath.description: The organizational unit's parent path. Required unless parentOrgUnitId is set.

parentOrgUnitId.description: The unique ID of the parent organizational unit. Required unless parentOrgUnitPath is set.

blockInheritance.description: Deprecated. Setting this field has no effect.

Users.title: Users List
Users.description: A paginated list response containing Google Workspace user resources.

nextPageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results.

Groups.title: Groups List
Groups.description: A paginated list response containing Google Workspace group resources.

nextPageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results.

OrgUnits.title: OrgUnits List
OrgUnits.description: A list response containing Google Workspace organizational unit resources.
